Enum Class PaleographyAssistant.ScriptType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PaleographyAssistant.ScriptType>
org.episteme.social.history.PaleographyAssistant.ScriptType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PaleographyAssistant.ScriptType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
PaleographyAssistant
public static enum PaleographyAssistant.ScriptType extends Enum<PaleographyAssistant.ScriptType>
Major historical Western European script types.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
